agents.name: sample-implementer
agents.mission: Create one small sample file cleanly so a reviewer can inspect it afterward.
agents.task: Create or replace sample-note.txt in the working directory containing exactly two lines: READY and REVIEW.
validation: Ensure the file contains exactly two lines: READY and REVIEW.
return_contract: Confirm the file was created and validated.

agents.name: sample-reviewer
agents.mission: Review the generated sample file without modifying anything.
agents.task: Review sample-note.txt and confirm whether it exists and contains exactly the lines READY and REVIEW. Do not modify files.
validation: Check that the file has exactly two lines.
Check that the lines are READY and REVIEW.
return_contract: If there is a problem, list it first.
If there is no problem, state that the sample file is correct.
